name: CODEX - POST.devad.io - Sheet To Social Full

parameters.content:
## POST.devad.io -> Google Sheet -> Social

1. Edit only the node named add-HERE-your-token-and-ids.
2. Reads the post tab directly from Google Sheets.
3. Expands Google Drive folder links and file links.
4. Supports direct links, text/image/video/carousel, comments, and FB/IG story duplicates.
5. Writes status back to Action? and log.
6. If Google Sheets or Google Drive nodes fail auth, relink them in n8n.
7. After import, manually bind the credential in Download Drive Media Asset once.

## Relink if needed

- Google Sheets node uses a Google Sheets OAuth2 credential.
- Google Drive node uses a Google Drive OAuth2 credential.
- Download Drive Media Asset must also be manually bound once after import.
- If either node errors, relink the credential in n8n and rerun.

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: Workflow finished processing current actionable rows.

parameters.queryString: ={{ "\"" + $("Current Row Batch").item.json.googleDriveFolderId + "\" in parents and trashed = false and mimeType != \"application/vnd.google-apps.folder\"" }}

parameters.jsCode:
function infer(h, urls){if(h) return h; if(!urls.length) return 'text'; if(urls.length>1) return 'carousel'; const f=String(urls[0]||'').split('?')[0].toLowerCase(); return /\.(mp4|mov|webm|avi|mkv|m4v|3gp)$/.test(f)?'video':'image';}
const row=$input.first().json; const mediaUrls=Array.isArray(row.directMediaUrls)?row.directMediaUrls.filter(Boolean):[]; return [{json:{...row,mediaUrls,postType:infer(row.postTypeHint,mediaUrls)}}];
